The patient was admitted on 3/15/2019. Testing began the next day and continued through the week.
First seizure recorded on March 15, 2019. No further events over 48 hours of monitoring.
Wada testing performed 2019-03-15. Results supported left-hemisphere language dominance.
Explant scheduled for Mar 15 pending pathology review. Family has been notified.
Post-op MRI on March 15 showed no new lesions. Wound healing well.
